# ConformanceRequirements.RequirementKeywords property

Every distinct RFC 2119 keyword recognized in the story's atoms, mapped to its canonical [`Level`](../ConformanceRequirements.Level.md) family (spec §2). The keys are the exact tokens used in the `[R-… · KEYWORD]` markers.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, Level> RequirementKeywords { get; }
```
